source_request: Plan GitHub issue #3: Define Cross-Product Identity Link Minimums.

criteria.description: Cross-product ref and link shapes are documented.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: doc inspection confirms CrossProductRef and CrossProductLink required and optional fields.

criteria.description: Required v0 link examples are documented.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: claim-to-run, review-to-claim, gate-to-evidence, and domain-field-to-claim examples are documented; parse optional fixture files if added.

criteria.description: Campfit provider field to Surface claim to Flow Review Item mapping can be represented.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: a concrete mapping includes Campfit provider field ref, Surface claim ref, Flow review item ref, and connecting CrossProductLink relations.

criteria.description: References must include product, kind, id, and optional label/url.
Links must include from, to, relation, and optional strength.
v0 relation vocabulary must support supports, blocks, updates, reviews, produced_by, evidenced_by, controls, and derived_from.
The spec must identify which links are required for v0 console usefulness.

goal_fit.summary: Pending execution and verification. The planned finish line is a durable docs/spec contract that preserves issue #3 requirements and stays within docs/examples scope.
